content:
The code's structure will be as such:
/src
/components
Wrapper.jsx         - Top-level layout component with global styling (font, padding, centering)
Header.jsx          - Contains heading and circular profile image
Bio.jsx             - Contains bio
Contact.jsx         - Horizontal rule, contact section with icons and links
/styles
globals.css         - Base styles and Plus Jakarta Sans font import
App.jsx             - Main entry point that assembles all components
/public
profile.jpg         - Provided square image to be shown as circular logo
index.html          - Root HTML file
